# Checkbox

Styled checkbox component built on the zw-checkbox primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/checkbox</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/checkbox
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@zeus-web/checkbox/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/checkbox/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop              | Type                                         | Default | Description                                         |
| ----------------- | -------------------------------------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------- |
| `checked`         | `boolean`                                    | -       | Controlled checked state.                           |
| `defaultChecked`  | `boolean`                                    | -       | Initial checked state.                              |
| `indeterminate`   | `boolean`                                    | -       | Mixed state.                                        |
| `size`            | `CheckboxSize`<br />Values: `sm`, `md`, `lg` | `md`    | Checkbox size.                                      |
| `required`        | `boolean`                                    | -       | Marks the checkbox as required.                     |
| `ariaLabel`       | `string`                                     | -       | Accessible label for unlabeled checkboxes.          |
| `ariaDescribedby` | `string`                                     | -       | ID reference for additional accessible description. |

## Events

| Event            | React prop        | Detail                                      | Description                         |
| ---------------- | ----------------- | ------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| `checked-change` | `onCheckedChange` | `checked: boolean, nativeEvent: Event`      | Emitted when checked state changes. |
| `focus-change`   | `onFocusChange`   | `focused: boolean, nativeEvent: FocusEvent` | Emitted when focus state changes.   |

## Slots

| Slot        | Description               |
| ----------- | ------------------------- |
| `default`   | Label content.            |
| `indicator` | Custom indicator content. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-primary`
- `text-primary-foreground`
- `ring-ring`

Internal selectors:

- `[&_[data-slot=checkbox-control]]`
- `[&_[data-slot=checkbox-indicator]]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `checkbox` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/checkbox`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add checkbox`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Checkbox for boolean form choices.
- Use indeterminate for mixed state.

Do not:

- Do not render a separate native input next to Checkbox.
- Do not manually manage aria-checked when using the primitive props.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox'

export function Example() {
  return <Checkbox>Accept terms</Checkbox>
}
```
